title: onagra muricata
intro: Onagra muricata, also known as Evening Primrose or Sickle-Seed, is a perennial herb belonging to the Onagraceae family, native to North America. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid. The health benefits of Onagra muricata include reducing inflammation, improving symptoms of eczema and other skin conditions, and supporting heart health. Herbal preparations of Onagra muricata seeds can be found in capsule or oil form, often used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
